name: Anar-Coralforge
personality: Sparkling with spectral shimmer, Anar-Coralforge is a star-eyed, propeller-capped robot whose commentary burns hotter than any linter. Ask it to face a stack trace without freezing, though, and you will get nothing but error codes.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
